Title: Successful user registration with valid credentials
Preconditions:
- User is not logged in.
- System is online and database is accessible.
Test Data:
- Username: `testuser123`
- Password: `SecurePass123!`
- Email: `testuser@example.com`
- Privacy document acceptance: `Yes`
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the registration page.
2. User enters valid username, password, email, and accepts privacy terms.
3. User submits the registration form.
4. System processes the request and stores user data in the database.
5. System returns a success response.
Expected Result:
- User account is created in the database.
- User is redirected to the login page or home page with a success message.
- No errors are displayed.

Title: Failed user registration with invalid email format
Preconditions:
- User is not logged in.
- System is online.
Test Data:
- Username: `testuser123`
- Password: `SecurePass123!`
- Email: `invalid-email` (missing @ and domain)
- Privacy document acceptance: `Yes`
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the registration page.
2. User enters invalid email format and submits the form.
3. System validates the input.
Expected Result:
- System displays an error message: "Invalid email format."
- User data is not stored in the database.
- User remains on the registration page.

Title: Successful user login with valid credentials
Preconditions:
- User is registered and exists in the database.
- System is online.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the login page.
2. User enters valid username and password.
3. User submits the login form.
4. System verifies credentials with the database.
5. System returns a success response.
Expected Result:
- User is redirected to the home page (`HOME` state).
- User session is established.
- No errors are displayed.

Title: Failed user login with incorrect password
Preconditions:
- User is registered and exists in the database.
- System is online.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the login page.
2. User enters valid username but incorrect password.
3. User submits the login form.
4. System verifies credentials with the database.
5. System returns a failure response.
Expected Result:
- System displays an error message: "Invalid username or password."
- User remains on the login page.
- No session is established.

Title: User attempts to access home page without logging in
Preconditions:
- User is not logged in.
- System is online.
Test Steps:
1. User directly accesses the home page URL.
2. System checks if the user is logged in.
Expected Result:
- System redirects the user to the login/registration page (`Fragment richiesta Login / registrazione`).
- No home page content is displayed.

Title: Successful profile data modification
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- System is online.
Test Data:
- Current name: `John Doe`
- Updated name: `John Smith`
- Updated email: `john.smith@example.com`
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the profile section (`Activity visualizzazione profilo`).
2. User clicks the "Modify Data" option (`Fragment modifica dati personali`).
3. User enters updated name and email.
4. User submits the changes.
5. System validates and saves the data to the database.
6. System returns a success response.
Expected Result:
- Updated profile data is displayed to the user.
- User is redirected to the home page (`HOME` state).
- No errors are displayed.

Title: Failed profile data modification with invalid email
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- System is online.
Test Data:
- Current name: `John Doe`
- Updated name: `John Smith`
- Updated email: `invalid-email` (invalid format)
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the profile section.
2. User clicks the "Modify Data" option.
3. User enters updated name and invalid email.
4. User submits the changes.
5. System validates the input.
Expected Result:
- System displays an error message: "Invalid email format."
- User remains on the profile modification page.
- No data is saved to the database.

Title: User views profile without modification
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- System is online.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the profile section.
2. System retrieves and displays user data from the database.
Expected Result:
- User’s current profile data (name, email, etc.) is displayed.
- No errors are shown.
- User can choose to modify data or return to home.

Title: Successful insertion of a new item
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- System is online.
Test Data:
- Item name: `Laptop`
- Item description: `High-performance laptop`
- Item image: `laptop.jpg` (valid file)
Test Steps:
1. User clicks the "Insert New Item" button.
2. User fills in item details (name, description, image).
3. User submits the form.
4. System validates and saves the item to the database.
5. System returns a success response.
Expected Result:
- New item is added to the database.
- Updated list of items is displayed to the user.
- User is redirected to the home page or item list.
- No errors are displayed.

Title: Failed insertion of an item with missing description
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- System is online.
Test Data:
- Item name: `Laptop`
- Item description: (empty)
- Item image: `laptop.jpg`
Test Steps:
1. User clicks the "Insert New Item" button.
2. User fills in item name and image but leaves description empty.
3. User submits the form.
4. System validates the input.
Expected Result:
- System displays an error message: "Description is required."
- Item is not saved to the database.
- User remains on the item insertion page.

Title: Successful deletion of an item with confirmation
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- System has at least one item in the database.
Test Steps:
1. User views the list of items (`Fragment elenco offerte`).
2. User selects an item to delete.
3. System prompts for confirmation: "Are you sure you want to delete this item?"
4. User confirms deletion.
5. System deletes the item from the database.
6. System returns a success response.
Expected Result:
- Deleted item is removed from the database.
- Updated list of items is displayed without the deleted item.
- User is redirected to the home page or item list.
- No errors are displayed.

Title: Cancel deletion of an item
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- System has at least one item in the database.
Test Steps:
1. User views the list of items.
2. User selects an item to delete.
3. System prompts for confirmation.
4. User cancels the deletion.
Expected Result:
- Item remains in the database.
- User is redirected back to the item list.
- No errors are displayed.

Title: Filtering items by category
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- System has multiple items in the database (e.g., "Electronics," "Books").
Test Steps:
1. User views the list of items.
2. User applies a filter for "Electronics."
3. System retrieves items matching the filter from the database.
4. System displays the filtered list.
Expected Result:
- Only items in the "Electronics" category are displayed.
- Filter option remains active.
- No errors are displayed.

Title: Successful creation of an exchange proposal
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- System is online.
Test Data:
- Proposal title: `Exchange Laptop for Books`
- Description: `Looking for books in exchange for my laptop.`
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the exchange proposal page.
2. User fills in proposal details (title, description).
3. User submits the proposal.
4. System saves the proposal to the database.
5. System returns a success response.
Expected Result:
- New exchange proposal is added to the database.
- User is redirected to the exchange list or home page.
- No errors are displayed.

Title: Accepting an exchange proposal
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- System has at least one exchange proposal in the database.
Test Steps:
1. User views the list of exchange proposals (`Fragment elenco proposte ricevute`).
2. User selects a proposal to accept.
3. System prompts for confirmation: "Are you sure you want to accept this proposal?"
4. User confirms acceptance.
5. System updates the proposal status to "Accepted" in the database.
Expected Result:
- Proposal status is updated to "Accepted."
- User is redirected to the proposal details or home page.
- No errors are displayed.

Title: Rejecting an exchange proposal
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- System has at least one exchange proposal in the database.
Test Steps:
1. User views the list of exchange proposals.
2. User selects a proposal to reject.
3. System prompts for confirmation: "Are you sure you want to reject this proposal?"
4. User confirms rejection.
5. System updates the proposal status to "Rejected" in the database.
Expected Result:
- Proposal status is updated to "Rejected."
- User is redirected back to the proposal list.
- No errors are displayed.

Title: Viewing exchange proposals without data
Preconditions:
- User is logged in.
- System has no exchange proposals in the database.
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the exchange proposal page.
2. System checks for available proposals (`Ho reperito i dati delle proposte?`).
Expected Result:
- System displays a message: "No exchange proposals found."
- User is redirected to the home page or prompted to create a proposal.
- No errors are displayed.
